// GRID: Pixel art resolution. More = finer detail, fewer = blockier but more visible
// ASPECT: Terminal cell aspect ratio (width:height). Typical: 0.55. Adjust if parrot looks stretched
// TRANSPARENCY: Alpha threshold 0-255. Pixels below this are transparent. Lower = more detail
// SHARP: Resampling: 'nearest' for sharp pixel art, 'lanczos' for smooth. Nearest is recommended
// QUANTIZE: Max colors per frame. 0 = no limit. Lower = fewer layers, bolder blocks (try 16-32)
// DARK_THRESHOLD: Remove near-black pixels (outlines). RGB sum below this = removed. 0 = keep all
// LIGHT_THRESHOLD: Remove near-white stray pixels. Pixels where min(R,G,B) > this are removed. 0 = keep all
// VERTICAL_OFFSET: Shift parrot up (+) or down (-) in the cell, in grid rows. 0 = auto bottom-align
// PADDING: Horizontal padding in grid columns (removed from each side). 0 = fill full width
// FONT: Base font to merge parrot glyphs into
// CODEPOINTS: First Unicode codepoint for parrot frames (Private Use Area)
